info.title: VTC API
info.description: VTC platform API — account, passenger, driver, and admin surfaces.

get.description:
Raw WebSocket upgrade for the **passenger** mobile surface.

**Handshake:** `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` where the token has
`activeRole=PASSENGER`.

**Envelope** — every message (both directions) is:

```json
{ "type": "event.name", "payload": { … }, "timestamp": "2026-05-30T10:00:00Z" }
```

**Server → Passenger events:**

| Type | Payload highlights |
|------|-------------------|
| `driver.location` | `{ rideId, driverId, lat, lng, capturedAt }` |
| `offer.created` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId, driverId, fare, direction, round, expiresAt }` |
| `offer.countered` | `{ offerId, parentOfferId, rideRequestId, driverId, fare, round, expiresAt }` |
| `offer.accepted` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId, rideId, driverId, fare }` |
| `offer.rejected` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId, reason }` |
| `offer.expired` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId }` |
| `ride.state_changed` | `{ rideId, state, occurredAt }` |
| `ride.cancelled` | `{ rideId, actorType, reason, occurredAt }` |
| `system.token_expiring` | `{ expiresAt }` |
| `system.auth_refresh` | `{ ok: true }` |

**Close codes:** `1000` normal · `4001` token expired · `4002` rate limit · `4003` auth revoked · `4004` server shutdown

**Heartbeat:** server sends ping every 30 s; 2 missed pongs → close.

See `docs/api/websocket.md` for the full protocol specification.

403.description: Wrong surface for this role (e.g. PASSENGER token on /ws/driver)

get.description:
Raw WebSocket upgrade for the **driver** mobile surface.

**Handshake:** `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` where the token has
`activeRole=DRIVER`.

**Envelope** — every message (both directions) is:

```json
{ "type": "event.name", "payload": { … }, "timestamp": "2026-05-30T10:00:00Z" }
```

**Server → Driver events:**

| Type | Payload highlights |
|------|-------------------|
| `ride.broadcast` | `{ rideRequestId, pickup, dropoff, proposedFare, femaleOnly, serviceType, vehicleCategory, expiresAt }` |
| `ride.broadcast_cancelled` | `{ rideRequestId, reason }` |
| `offer.countered` | `{ offerId, parentOfferId, rideRequestId, passengerId, fare, round, expiresAt }` |
| `offer.accepted` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId, rideId, fare }` |
| `offer.rejected` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId, reason }` |
| `offer.expired` | `{ offerId, rideRequestId }` |
| `ride.state_changed` | `{ rideId, state, occurredAt }` |
| `ride.cancelled` | `{ rideId, actorType, reason, occurredAt }` |
| `system.token_expiring` | `{ expiresAt }` |

**Client → Server (driver upstream):**

| Type | Payload |
|------|---------|
| `driver.location` | `{ lat, lng, capturedAt, accuracyM? }` |
| `system.auth_refresh` | `{ token }` |

**Close codes:** `1000` normal · `4001` token expired · `4002` rate limit · `4003` auth revoked · `4004` server shutdown

**Heartbeat:** server sends ping every 30 s; 2 missed pongs → close.

See `docs/api/websocket.md` for the full protocol specification.

403.description: Wrong surface for this role (e.g. PASSENGER token on /ws/driver)
